text: Read the vision, PRD, and market analysis. Drafting a low-chrome mobile design with the streak count as the anchor.
Going with warm neutrals and one accent color. The streak number dominates the home screen; single check-in button below. Calm, not loud.
Love it. Make sure the 'already checked today' state still feels like a reward, not a dead state.
Agreed — the button becomes a filled confirmation pill with the time-stamp, not a greyed-out button. Three mockups: Home, Dashboard history, Settings.
UI designs saved to docs/office/05-ui-designs/. Passing to Chief Architect.
